citations.desc: Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC).
citations.narrative:
During records review, the May 2025 semi annual report was not prepared and submitted to the Institutional Official (IO)
upon completion of the required semiannual evaluations. While the program review and inspection were conducted in
May 2025, it was not approved by a majority of the Institutional Animal Care & Use Committee (IACUC) or submitted to
the IO until December 2025. The facility corrected the administrative delay once it was identified and reported it
appropriately. Semi annual reports to the IO ensure the welfare of the animals used in covered activities at the facility are
reported as required by the Animal Welfare Act.
Corrected at the time of inspection on 18 March 2026
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with IACUC Representative.
n

narrative:
2.31(c)(3) 
   
Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC). 
During records review, the May 2025 semi annual report was not prepared and submitted to the Institutional Official (IO) 
upon completion of the required semiannual evaluations. While the program review and inspection were conducted in 
May 2025, it was not approved by a majority of the Institutional Animal Care & Use Committee (IACUC) or submitted to 
the IO until December 2025. The facility corrected the administrative delay once it was identified and reported it 
appropriately. Semi annual reports to the IO ensure the welfare of the animals used in covered activities at the facility are 
reported as required by the Animal Welfare Act. 
 
Corrected at the time of inspection on 18 March 2026 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with IACUC Representative.
